title: Cuneiform Tablet #0976: Old Assyrian Tax Record
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a tax record document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a tax record document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Assyrian period. Tax Record document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records tax record matters typical of Old Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
